---
title: "Safe Refactor Stack"
---

# Safe Refactor Stack

**Working seal:** `stack://safe-refactor-stack/E351AC61F4`

**Enter:** Use when structure must improve without changing externally visible behavior.


## Related Runes

- [1172 invariant](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1172) - A law that must remain true while the rest of the system is allowed to move. If you cannot say the invariant, you probably do not yet understand the change.
- [1152 contract test](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1152) - A promise checked at the seam between systems. Use it when mocks are too flattering and end-to-end tests are too blunt.
- [1088 diff {Forge}](../reference/house-build-tooling-versioning-and-release.qmd#rune-1088) - A visible account of what changed between one state and another. Good diffs make review local; bad diffs turn truth into fog.
- [1430 backward-compatible](../reference/house-guarantee-words-quality-attributes-and-behavioral-adjectives.qmd#rune-1430) - New versions do not casually break old clients or data.
- [1445 deterministic](../reference/house-guarantee-words-quality-attributes-and-behavioral-adjectives.qmd#rune-1445) - Given the same inputs, the same result should return. This is the antidote to drift, heisenbugs, and unreviewable behavior.


## Related Spell Templates and References

- [Safe Refactoring](../spells/safe-refactoring.qmd)
- [Test Generation](../spells/test-generation.qmd)
- [Stack Grammar](../reference/stack-grammar.qmd)
- [Failure Modes](../reference/failure-modes.qmd)
- [Canon Map](../reference/canon-map.qmd)
| Step | Spell             | Artifact                                  | Advance when                                              |
| ---- | ----------------- | ----------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Freeze invariants | Behavior and data contracts               | What must not change is named                             |
| 2    | Characterize      | Tests or characterization evidence        | Current behavior is pinned                                |
| 3    | Reshape           | Structural patch                          | Structure improves without intentional behavior change    |
| 4    | Static verify     | Type, lint, and architecture check output | Static checks pass                                        |
| 5    | Behavior verify   | Characterization test output              | Behavior evidence stays green                             |
| 6    | Review            | Human review notes                        | No leaky abstractions, drift, or renamed confusion remain |

## Loop or Recursion

```json
{
  "steps": [
    3,
    4,
    5
  ],
  "until": "Desired structure is reached without invariant breakage"
}
```


## On Fail

Revert to the last green state and restate invariants more precisely.

## Why It Works

It puts behavioral contracts in front of structural ambition.
